g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is in the activation request payload?')
sendPrompt('How is the license key looked up in the LICENSE table?')
sendPrompt('What license status values should block access?')
sendPrompt('How is the license expiry checked on the server?')
sendPrompt('How does the server enforce the seat count limit?')
sendPrompt('How does the server check if this machine already has an active activation?')
sendPrompt('What fields are written to LICENSE_ACTIVATION and AUDIT_LOG?')
